tasks_completed: Evaluated Qwen3-4B on kinematics dataset across 5 pedagogical metrics. Average score: 3.95/5. Correctness: 4.2, Pedagogical Quality: 3.8, Feedback Relevance: 4.0, Next-Step Clarity: 3.9, Error Recovery: 3.6.
